memory_tool_usage:
Use the memorise tool when:
  1. The user says something worth remembering as advice or for improving.
  2. You just executed a tool and want to remember useful output — either needed for another consecutive tool execution, or a personal thought on what to do next if the tool execution failed.
tool_result_persistence: Every tool you call automatically saves its full result to brain.json. On the next prompt, that result is loaded into Memory so you can reference it — no need to memorise tool outputs manually.
available_skill_tags:
notion:
  list_notion_pages — Lists all Notion pages with id, title, is_public
  get_notion_page_content — Retrieves a Notion page's content as readable text (with optional filter: all, headings, todos)
